subject: A robed cultist in a horned owl-like white mask and long dark cape standing reverently in a gothic columned hall filled with scattered moths or butterflies
description: A solitary robed figure stands in the center of a large gothic architectural space with tall dark columns and arched windows emitting teal-green light. The figure wears an elaborate white mask with upward-curving horns or ear-like projections reminiscent of an owl or horned beast, obscuring the face entirely. A long dark coat or cape with brown-tipped feathered edges drapes to the floor. A circular emblem or medallion is visible on the chest. Small moth or butterfly shapes — white and pale — scatter through the air around the figure. The posture is upright and still, conveying devotion or waiting.
foreground: Masked robed cultist with moths/butterflies in dark gothic hall
background: Gothic columns and arched windows with teal-green glow
